programme.title: Scorpion

programme.title: Scorpion

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Happy, Sylvester and Cabe suffer from life-threatening, fear-based hallucinations after a simple mission to protect a vital seed bank goes awry.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must move Happy's friend Ada, and the sterile bubble Ada lives in that protects her compromised immune system, to a secure location after a severe storm leaves the structure surrounded by dangerous debris.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: To stop a dangerous virus from spreading, Team Scorpion must locate an endangered monkey in the Amazon that has the antibody for the cure; Toby and Happy see a counselor to prepare for matrimony.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team races to save Paige and Happy when a wire supporting the gondola they are in during a mission to repair a turbine at a wind farm snaps.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: The team defies the orders of a foreign government when it retrieves an asteroid containing DNA strands that could have deadly consequences if they are exposed.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: In a seemingly perfect community, a boy is chosen to learn about the pain and pleasure of the "real" world.

programme.title: Voyagers
programme.desc: A crew of astronauts set off for a new planet—a journey that descends into chaos.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: An ex-con and his adopted brother go on the run with a weapon of mysterious origin as their only protection.

programme.title: A Walk To Remember
programme.desc: Set in North Carolina, "A Walk To Remember" follows the rite of passage of a jaded, aimless high school senior (Shane West) who falls in love with a guileless young woman (Mandy Moore) he and his friends once scorned. The two develop a powerful and inspirational relationship in which they discover truths that take most people a lifetime to learn.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Before I Go To Sleep [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Ever since a vicious attack nearly claimed her life, Christine Lucas (Nicole Kidman) has suffered from anterograde amnesia and is unable to form new memories. Every morning, she becomes reacquainted with her husband, Ben (Colin Firth), and the other constants in her life. In accordance with her doctor's (Mark Strong) instructions, Christine keeps a video diary. As Christine starts to uncover terrifying truths about her past, she begins to question everything -- and everyone -- around her.

programme.title: Bordertown [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Jennifer Lopez is a tenacious reporter investigating the murders of young women working in a bordertown.

programme.title: Affliction
programme.desc: A man's life unravels in a small town.

programme.title: Unlawful Entry
programme.desc: A burglar holds a knife to Karen's throat while her husband does nothing.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A former getaway driver jeopardizes his Witness Protection Plan.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: Malcolm and Kisha move into their dream home, then learn that a demon also resides there.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail Of Blood
programme.desc: Product of a botched experiment, a genetically enhanced anaconda offspring regenerates to create panic and destruction in this next action-packed chapter of the Anaconda series.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: A tough but straight-arrow cop battles a group of military and government elitists who have developed an extraordinary helicopter into the ultimate weapon. Edited for TV.

programme.title: Whatever It Takes
programme.desc: A nerdy high school senior and the class jock conspire to help each other win the hearts of their dream girls.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: Kiki (Julia Roberts), is the personal assistant to beautiful megastar, Gwen (Catherine Zeta-Jones) and is in love with Eddie (John Cusack), Gwen s estranged husband. Kiki is given the monumental task of helping Gwen and Eddie make it through a press junket organized by publicity exec Lee Phillips (Billy Crystal). But at this junket, everything is going to change.

programme.title: Forbidden
programme.desc: An affair with a small-town librarian threatens the career of an up-and-coming politician.

programme.title: The Guns Of Navarone
programme.desc: In this WWII spectacle, British intelligence learns that two enormous guns have been installed on the Aegean island of Navarone. The long-range field pieces are capable of destroying any British fleet trying to sail to Kheros, near Turkey, where a large British force is facing annihilation unless it is evacuated. It s the job of Captain Mallory and a handful of men to land secretly on Navarone and dismantle the guns.

programme.title: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: IN COLD BLOOD dramatizes actual events and people in a realistic, technically well-crafted fashion, based upon Truman Capote s novel. The movie is a faithful docudrama about the real-life mass murder of the Clutter family, which took place in Holcomb, Kansas on November 15, 1959 by two psychopathic killers.

programme.title: Anatomy Of A Murder
programme.desc: When his flirtatious young wife (Lee Remick) claims she was raped, an army lieutenant (Ben Gazzara)kills her attacker and hires small-town lawyer James Stewart to defend him.

programme.title: Battle Of Algiers
programme.desc: In the 1950s, fear and violence escalate as the people of Algiers fight for independence from the French government.

programme.title: C.H.U.D.
programme.desc: Bizarre disappearances in NYC that point to something unsavory in the sewers.

programme.title: Blind Horizon
programme.desc: At the hospital, Frank comes out of a coma with amnesia. The sheriff wants to know who shot him. Later Frank remembers that something's happening to the president. Who is Frank?

programme.title: Going All The Way
programme.desc: After returning home from the Korean War, two young men search for love and fulfillment in middle America.

programme.title: Homegrown
programme.desc: Life is good for Jack, Carter and Harlan, three inept ne'r-do-wells who help run master dope-grower Malcoms flourishing marijuana plantation somewhere in northern California. But then Malcom is suddenly bumped off by a mysterious assailant, after a moment of panic, the naive trio decide to take over the business themselves. However, their lazy days on the dope farm have ill prepared them for the high-stakes game of finding buyers for millions of dollars of contraband. As they plunge into a shadowy new world of duplicity, double-dealing and danger, they soon find that they have gotten in way, way over their heads. But driven on by increasing greed and paranoia, it's too late to back out.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: After Nazis steal his gold, an ex-commando will go to outrageous lengths to get it back.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger fights for survival against drug traffickers who have stashed heroin in his hunting cabin.

programme.title: El Gringo
programme.desc: A man is waylaid in a Mexican border town full of gangsters with a satchel full of stolen cash.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: The sheriff of a sleepy border town finds his life interrupted when a drug boss flees straight toward his town

programme.title: Silent Night
programme.desc: A tormented father seeks vengeance after his son dies in a gang’s crossfire.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.desc: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

programme.title: Furie
programme.desc: A former gang leader battles human traffickers to save her kidnapped daughter.

programme.desc: Honed from childhood to be an elite assassin, Sook-hee embarks on a rampage of violence and revenge to finally earn her freedom and escape her past.

programme.title: The Legend of Tomiris

programme.title: Kung Fu Killer

programme.title: Lila and Eve
programme.desc: After the murder of her son, a grief-stricken mother joins forces with another woman for vigilante justice.

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: Bethany and Terrence are desperate to find another brother for their daughter.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The College Admissions Scandal with Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: The rich and famous abusing their privilege to get their kids into college

programme.title: Buried in Barstow
programme.desc: Angie Harmon plays Hazel King, a single mom concealing her past.

programme.title: Lila and Eve
programme.desc: After the murder of her son, a grief-stricken mother joins forces with another woman for vigilante justice.

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: Bethany and Terrence are desperate to find another brother for their daughter.

programme.title: A Royal Makeover
programme.desc: When Ramone discovers he is about to be King, he takes lessons from royal expert Angelica.

programme.title: My Daddy is In Heaven
programme.desc: Becca and Adam Smith along with their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragedy strikes

programme.title: Midnight Stallion
programme.desc: JACK and his daughter TERESA train a wild horse in hopes of winning enough money to save their farm.

programme.title: Stressed To Death
programme.desc: At a robbery at a mini mart an EMT is faced with two victims; a pregnant lady and a man shot but still alive.

programme.title: Desperate Hours
programme.desc: A man kidnaps two girls in Oregon triggering the Amber Alert system throughout many surrounding states.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: The New Girl
programme.desc: When her sister Monica suddenly disappears under suspicious circumstances, Malorie becomes convinced that Monica's seemingly perfect husband is hiding something sinister. She then launches her own investigation and unearths a twisted web of lies, abuse, and even political conspiracy. Malorie must confront dangerous secrets that not only threaten her sister's life but her own.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Reality TV Murders
programme.desc: In the world of reality TV, Chasity Safire is a household name and has been the star of the hugely popular reality TV show “Diva’s Doing it” for the past 5 years. When one of the castmates is found dead, the women become suspects and we discover that some of the women would literally kill to be famous.

programme.title: Betrayal at First Hand
programme.desc: After her friend Monica betrays her by sleeping with Big D, Sarah's grief quickly spirals into madness. However, her breakdown is accelerated by a shocking twist and only Big D knows the truth. He must reveal the crime to Sarah, hoping that unveiling one horrific truth can redeem him and save the woman he lost.

programme.title: Trap A Fool
programme.desc: After two years of what he thought was a perfect relationship, Jeremiah uncovers his beloved Shay-Shay's "black book" of men. He is forced to realize that her gentle nature was a facade, a calculated move in her "game of fools." Shay-Shay's only loves are herself, sex, and money, and their dangerous game is about to end.

programme.title: Double Standards 2
programme.desc: When Pastor Noble Jonez’s carefully constructed image begins to unravel, his wife Trezjiir is forced to confront not only the trauma of her past but the deceit poisoning her present. As buried secrets resurface—ranging from infidelity, hidden paternity, abuse of power, and criminal ties—every lie brings them closer to destruction.

programme.title: Exposed
programme.desc: Content creator Mia's serene retreat turns sinister when stalker Damon forces her into a dark livestream. He exposes her deepest secrets, from infidelity to a cover-up in a death, unraveling her life for the world to see. As her husband and best friend are dragged into the chaos, Mia must confront her past or lose everything.

programme.title: Mercenaries
programme.desc: A team of female commandos is assembled to infiltrate a high-security women's prison and rescue a dignitary.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm: Time Wars
programme.desc: When Rumpelstiltskin tries to take over Earth, The Avengers Grimm must track him through time to defeat him.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy saves the life of a dying girl and his mission gains momentum.

programme.title: Ape vs. Monster
programme.desc: An ape in space crashes on Earth. Sludge from the ship triggers massive growth in the ape and a gila monster.

programme.title: San Andreas Mega Quake
programme.desc: The "Big One" will sink California into the ocean, and scientists must stop by triggering a volcanic eruption.

programme.title: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Plagued by a powerful witch, a fearless hunter and his warriors must confront her dark magic to restore peace.

programme.title: It Hatched
programme.desc: A couple moves from Nashville to a remote fjord in Iceland in search of peace and serenity. Their plans are horrifically altered when an ancient demon escapes from under their basement floor and Mira gives birth to an egg.

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp (Edited Version)
programme.desc: After a terrible boating accident killed her family, shy Angela Baker (Felissa Rose, Return to Sleepaway Camp) went to live with her eccentric Aunt Martha and her cousin Ricky. This summer, Martha decides to send them both to Camp Arawak, a place to enjoy the great outdoors. Shortly after their arrival, a series of bizarre and violent accidents begin to claim the lives of various campers. Has a dark secret returned from the camps past or will an unspeakable horror end the summer season for all?

programme.title: Starry Eyes (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Determined to make it as an actress in Hollywood, Sarah Walker spends her days working a dead-end job, enduring petty friendships and going on countless casting calls in hopes of catching her big break. After a series of strange auditions, Sarah lands the leading role in a new film from a mysterious production company. But with this opportunity comes bizarre ramifications that will transform her both mentally and physically into something beautiful... and altogether terrifying. From the producer of Cheap Thrills and Jodorowskys Dune, Dennis Widmyer & Kevin Kolschs STARRY EYES is an occult tale of ambition, possession, and the true cost of fame.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: Streaming exclusively from Bloody Disgusting and Scotchworthy Productions, Bloody Bites is a compilation of snack-sized horror films that will terrorize, astonish, disturb, and excite genre fans across the globe.

programme.title: Tales From The Void
programme.desc: Juan and his friends like to spend their evenings pranking the neighborhood. But what happens when they hit the wrong kind of house?

programme.title: Onyx the Fortuitous and the Talisman of Souls
programme.desc: Amateur occultist Marcus J. Trillbury, aka Onyx the Fortuitous, is struggling at home and work, but his dreams seem to be answered when he lands a coveted invitation to the mansion of his idol Bartok the Great for a ritual to raise the spirit of an ancient demon. As Onyx and a fellow group of devotees join Bartok to prepare for the ceremony, the getaway of his dreams soon takes a nightmarish turn and Onyx must decide what hes willing to truly sacrifice in order to meet his destiny.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After a long winter trapped in the ice, scouting parties are sent out in search of open water. One of the teams makes a frightening discovery.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With something now stalking the ships, the captains debate their options, testing their loyalty to one another against their duty to their crews.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A cunning attack on the ships proves the men are not battling an ordinary bear and that the region's Inuit culture may hold a key to their survival.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A strange illness begins to show itself while another more familiar one jeopardizes the expedition's most valuable resource - its captain's judgment.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With the end of their provisions in sight, officers contemplate an 800-mile walkout while planning a party to raise the men's worsening spirits.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the men begin their long march south for rescue, a series of shocking events underscores how vulnerable and exposed their situation has become.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The death of an officer under mysterious circumstances creates paranoia among the men. Crozier discovers some of the crew may be considering mutiny.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Hope comes in strange forms, and the question of what the men are willing to do to survive begins to be settled in both noble and horrifying ways.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: Cry Blood Apache (Edited Version)
programme.desc: An Apache brave seeks vengeance on a band of sadistic gold hunters in this bloody drive-in western. Pitcalin (Jody McRae) leads the marauders who wipe out an Apache camp when they discover gold, only to watch their violent deeds lead to their own demise. Featuring a superb cast that also includes Dan Kemp, Robert Tessier, and Joel McRae, this coldblooded western tale was directed by character actor and filmmaker Jack Starrett (Cleopatra Jones, The Losers).

programme.title: Enemy of the Law
programme.desc: Tex Ritter stars in this western drama about a man who goes undercover to befriend a convict believed to have stolen a shipment of government gold. Also starring Guy Wilkerson as Panhandle Perkins, this offering from Hollywoods Poverty Row features the usual fistfights and entertaining storyline that made these modestly budgeted features well worth watching. Songs include Teach Me To Forget and You Will Have to Pay both sung by Tex!

programme.title: McLintock
programme.desc: He likes his whiskey hard... His women soft... And his west all to himself! Inspired by Shakespeares The Taming of the Shrew (1594), John Wayne (The Searchers, Stagecoach), Maureen OHara (Miracle on 34th Street, The Parent Trap), and Patrick Wayne (The Searchers, The Alamo) star in this western comedy directed by Andrew V. McLaglen (Gunsmoke, The Wild Geese). George Washington McLintock (John Wayne) is the wealthiest man in his territory who utilizes his power and influence to maintain order between farmers, ranchers, Indians, corrupt government officials, and his own family! McLintock is McNificent!

programme.title: Land of Hunted Men
programme.desc: A band of outlaws is terrorizing a town in the West. Leave it to Ray Crash Corrigan and his Range Busters to ride in and save the day. This film marked the return of Corrigan to the famous series; he had appeared in the first sixteen movies but left for a brief hiatus following 1942's ARIZONA STAGECOACH. This was the 21st of 24 movies in the Range Busters series. Produced between 1940-1943, the Range Busters were a huge financial success for Monogram Pictures.

programme.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Butch Cavendish gang ambushes a group of Texas Rangers, killing all but one. The surviving ranger is nursed back to health by Native American Tonto, and takes on the identity of a masked vigilante, determined to bring all outlaws to justice. Culled from episodes of the popular TV series, this feature is great fun for fans of the Lone Ranger. Starring Clayton Moore and Jay Silverheels.

programme.title: Lost Canyon

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.desc: The roar of 12,000-pound titans descends upon the Paycom Center as Monster Jam Replay heads to Oklahoma City for Round 7 of the Arena Championship Series West. The energy is electric in "Loud City" as elite drivers face off in a high-stakes triple-threat of JCB Racing, the technical Two-Wheel Skills Challenge, and the chaotic brilliance of Freestyle. Witness a tense racing tiebreaker between Carson Williams and Ashley Sanford, and watch as Armando Castro and Tim Hall Jr. battle for critical series points. From Alex Bardin’s vertical precision in EarthShaker to Blake Granger’s powerful pursuit of a "redemption arc" in Monster Mutt Dalmatian, this episode captures the raw power and heart-pounding drama that only Monster Jam can deliver.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his deeply satisfying Pasta e Fagioli during Bean Week, building a thick, soul-warming pasta and bean soup that he considers one of the greatest cold-weather dishes ever conceived. The hosts debate the pronunciation of Italian words in Italian-American households and celebrate the cultural heritage behind this Roman classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In the debut episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon welcomes viewers into his Venice, California front yard alongside his wife Liz Symon and their friend Olivia Annacone Cisic for an unfiltered, laid-back cookout. Celebrating Cinco de Mayo, Michael prepares simple yet flavorful black cod fish tacos on a plancha, walking through his approach to seasoning, cooking fish by sight, and building a bright, crunchy slaw with cabbage, citrus, and charred poblanos. The conversation flows easily as the trio shares cooking tips, debates ingredients like corn versus flour tortillas, and jokes about knife sharpening habits, cilantro preferences, and home cooking realities. Liz complements the meal with a refreshing jalapeño margarita, balancing heat with fresh lime juice, simple syrup, and a hint of orange liqueur, while adding her own creative twist with lemon and bitters. Throughout the episode, the group emphasizes flexibility in cooking—encouraging viewers to adjust flavors, garnishes, and spice levels to their own tastes. Lighthearted banter continues as they assemble tacos, discuss plating ideas, and highlight optional additions like crema and avocado. The episode wraps with a taste test, enthusiastic reactions to both the tacos and cocktail, and a reminder that great food doesn’t have to be complicated—just fresh, simple, and made with joy.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his legendary Sexy Time Chicken for Valentine's Day, a dish he swears exudes confidence, intention, and genuine romance with every bite. Guest Devyn Simone joins to share relationship etiquette wisdom, and the hosts explore what makes food truly feel romantic beyond just the recipe itself.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly takes on a true first in his cooking career by attempting homemade corn dogs without any prior test run, bringing a mix of nerves and excitement to the kitchen as Michael Symon and Carla Hall cheer him on. Inspired by a popular recipe from Natasha’s Kitchen, Clinton walks through the batter and frying process in real time, navigating hot oil, technique adjustments, and plenty of playful banter. As the trio discusses their favorite fair foods—from funnel cake to childhood carnival memories—the conversation veers into hilarious territory, including rollercoaster mishaps and food-related regrets. Despite the pressure, Clinton successfully executes the corn dogs, achieving a golden, airy batter that impresses both Carla and Michael. The tasting confirms the dish as a win, with praise for its balanced sweetness, texture, and classic flavor. The episode also features a “Fan of the Day” segment, celebrating Charlene from New York with a personalized shoutout, along with a quick fan mail discussion about music preferences while cooking, revealing everything from Judy Garland to Metallica and R.E.M. The episode wraps on a high note, with Clinton’s confidence restored, the group celebrating a successful first attempt, and the hosts encouraging viewers to engage, subscribe, and bring the fun into their own kitchens.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly takes the lead in the kitchen as he prepares a nostalgic Quiche Lorraine inspired by his mother, making the case for a simple yet meaningful Mother’s Day brunch made at home. As he walks through the process—layering raw onions, crispy bacon, and a rich egg-and-cream custard into a par-baked crust—Carla Hall and Michael Symon chime in with their own takes on brunch traditions, ingredient preferences, and the beauty of regional cuisine. The trio shares laughs over everything from vintage baby names to the infamous “Real Men Don’t Eat Quiche” era, using humor to dismantle outdated ideas around food and masculinity. Along the way, they highlight the importance of texture and balance, celebrating the silky, slightly jiggly custard as the hallmark of a perfectly baked quiche. A fan interaction segment adds a personal touch, with a “Fan of the Day” selected for a custom video message, reinforcing the show’s community-driven spirit. Once the quiche comes out of the oven, the hosts dig in, offering real-time reactions and thoughtful observations about flavor, technique, and versatility—debating whether quiche is best suited for brunch, lunch, or dinner. The episode wraps with a heartfelt nod to mothers everywhere and a reminder that sometimes the simplest dishes, made with care, are the most memorable.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall takes the lead in the kitchen as she introduces a playful and unexpected dish: fried Kool-Aid, inspired by nostalgic state fair treats from her childhood. As she walks through the process of making the vibrant red dough using Kool-Aid powder, flour, sugar, and a leavening agent, Clinton Kelly reacts with skepticism while Michael Symon shares his own less-than-great experience trying the dish at a fair. The conversation quickly turns humorous as Carla recounts a bizarre childhood memory of having a runny nose at the fair, prompting playful teasing from the group. As the dough is fried into donut hole-like bites, the hosts discuss technique, including how the dough naturally flips in hot oil and how to tell when it’s perfectly cooked. Carla elevates the dish by tossing the warm bites in lemon sugar and offering a Kool-Aid glaze for dipping, balancing sweetness with a bright citrus note. Once tasted, both Clinton and Michael are pleasantly surprised, praising the light texture and more refined flavor compared to traditional fair versions. The episode transitions into a lively fan mail segment where the hosts debate their least favorite vegetables and share personal preferences, followed by a special “fan of the day” moment celebrating a crew member’s mother’s birthday with jokes and a spontaneous song from Clinton. The episode wraps with the hosts encouraging viewers to engage with the show and teasing future fun.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off a new era of Simply Symons from Venice, California, joined by Liz Symon and Olivia “Liv” Annacone Cisic for a laid-back backyard cookout centered around the ultimate burger debate: smash burgers versus classic pub burgers. Michael walks through the techniques behind each style, from selecting the ideal fat ratio for ground beef to achieving the perfect crust on a hot grill and cast iron griddle. Along the way, the trio shares stories about old Symon’s Dinners episodes, Liv’s transition into motherhood, and the realities of filming outdoors with planes overhead, lawn equipment buzzing nearby, and neighborhood life unfolding around them. As Michael builds both burgers with grilled onions, pickles, secret sauce, and different cheeses, the conversation turns into a humorous discussion about condiments, cooking preferences, smash burger myths, and burger nostalgia. Liz keeps the energy going with playful jabs at Michael while also preparing his favorite cocktail, the bourbon-based Paper Plane, complete with Aperol, Amaro, and fresh lemon juice. The episode wraps with a tasting session comparing both burgers side-by-side, with everyone weighing in on which version wins the battle. Between the casual banter, cooking tips, and family-style atmosphere, the episode delivers an easygoing and highly approachable backyard burger feast.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly pitches his inspired Loaf Three Ways concept for Anything Goes week, proposing that each host make a different loaf ó savory, sweet, and somewhere in between ó in a format he has been developing for months. The hosts celebrate the Indiana Jones Temple of Doom opening number as the perfect anthem for a week with no rules.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly replaces cooking with a March Madness-style bracket tournament for boxed brownie mixes, staging eight brands in head-to-head blind taste tests to crown an ultimate winner. After an epic series of eliminations, Duncan Hines Double Fudge emerges victorious at just $4.29 a box.

programme.title: Chewed Up

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores everything from beguiling mastiha, to the local pasta to unique tomatoes, dangling like giant rubies against the renowned geometric patterns on medieval houses of Pyrgi. The flavors of historic Chios inspire her to cook up a succulent chicken and quince dish and an easy traditional black eyed pea salad with Mastiha vinaigrette.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Everyone loves baked pasta, and in this episode, Lidia prepares a baked penne dish with a comforting pork ragu and zucchini topped with a golden crust of cheese. She also makes an elegant salad of asparagus, scallions, and boiled egg and finishes the meal with a delicious and moist chocolate zucchini cake.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Roasted Peppers Stuffed with Tuna.; Savory Onions Stuffed with Lamb and Sweet Raisins; The Cauliflower and Tomato Soup

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia begins this meal with a savory zucchini and rice crostata. She then turns to the sweets with a celebration of zeppole, a fried delicious dough stuffed with creamy ricotta. Grandma Erminia, joins Lidia for this segment. Lastly, there is still time for a classic and Lidia prepares an easy steamed mussel dish with white wine, onions, bay leaves, and pepperoncino.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: If you can't make it to Milan for a dish of "Risotto alla Milanese" bring the dish to your kitchen! Lidia begins today's meal with a creamy risotto alla Milanese with saffron and marrow bone followed by a succulent quail stuffed with Italian sausage and mushrooms. For dessert, it's an Italian classic - light and creamy panna cotta with seasonal berries.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia prepares a nice and refreshing pan seared shrimp with arugula pesto. Her next dish is butterflied trout, fried in a pan with bacon and basil served with a zucchini dish made with anchovies and capers.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen
programme.desc: Lidia shows viewers how to prepare a unique salad of radicchio and oranges, a perfect blend of bitter and sweet. She then makes a heartwarming braised chicken thigh dish with potatoes and olives, a family favorite.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom explore Kyushu, the most southerly of the Japanese main islands. They master the art of making the world famous Tonkotsu Ramen, fashion their own sushi knives with the help of a blacksmith who ordinarily has an eight-year waiting list for his product, and participate in a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves seafood and feels lucky to live by Long Island Sound with its wonderful stocks of Atlantic fish and shellfish. He prepares scallops, crab and cod––raw, fried, sauteed or grilled in dishes that are quick, simple and delicious.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Gathering with family and friends around the table or for a game of boules is the life’s greatest pleasure for Jacques. He makes chicken wings, cucumber soup, merguez sausage, zucchini canapes, hummus and his father’s Fromage Fort. Simple food that can be made ahead means that you can enjoy a glass of wine with your company.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques shows that with a well-stocked pantry and a few good cooking techniques, you can make a tasty dish or a simple meal. His pantry essentials include potato flakes for a simple soup, spaghetti for a quick main dish, lentils, canned salmon, polenta and finally, in the freezer, a poundcake that can be transformed into a celebration dessert.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacues knows that most of us want to eat a healthy diet with lots of organic produce. Now so much is available at farmers markets and in grocery stores, you don’t have to spend a fortune if you chose what’s in season when it tastes the best. But for those times you’re in a hurry, it’s okay to grab prewashed, precut or frozen vegetables to make your life easier.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: For Jacques, a rite of spring is to enjoy the salad his father made every year at this time… Spring is also when asparagus appears and he pairs it with grilled tuna. He cooks fresh peas as soon as they arrive in the market and Jacques, not wanting to waste anything, uses the pods to make a soup. He ends with his friend Ed’s Pasta Primavera…

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK

programme.desc: Uncooperative and agitated, a man complains officers are violating his rights. A “443” call is issued, and a deputy desperately needs help. Outside the cell block, there’s knockouts and bloody noses.

programme.desc: A man attempts to eat marijuana in jail. The Special Detention Unit investigates forbidden letters hidden amongst inmates. A bloody, vicious brawl escalates between an imprisoned duo.

programme.desc: Headbutts and aggression abound during a jail fight. A young man is arrested after stealing $1,500 worth of hats. Officers discover a suicidal inmate who’s no longer taking his medication.

programme.title: Angry Planet

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the world’s worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet – 231 miles per hour – was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a “human popsicle”, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Council’s high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is “Wild Water” – our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show – a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Mountain Lakes, United States

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Sunrises and Sunsets

programme.title: The World's Most Beautiful Waterfalls
programme.desc: From world famous Yosemite Falls in California to the spectacular Victoria Falls in Africa, you'll witness some of the most spectacular and beautiful waterfalls on earth.

programme.title: Enchanted Ice Cream - Super Simple
programme.desc: Today, the Bumble Nums are going to make Enchanted Ice Cream Sundaes! With a map in hand, Humble, Grumble, and Stumble search the orchard for the secret ingredient … and discover a fairy treehouse leading to an enchanted world! The Bumble Nums travel through the portal…but do they find the ingredient they’re looking for? And can they get it back to the kitchen in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Hello Hello! - Super Simple Puppets and more
programme.desc: Sing and dance along with the Super Simple Puppets to “Hello Hello!”! It’s a classic Super Simple action song for kids.

programme.title: Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: The Bumble Nums are making an Erupting Raspberry Lava Cake but the secret ingredient is at the top of Mount Fruity Volcano! Can Humble, Grumble, and Stumble climb the volcano and get what they need before it blows? And can they do it in time for the Cooking Countdown? Watch and see!

programme.title: Let's Go For A Drive! - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Get in on the fun and join Milo in his pretend car for a quick ride. Do you see the ducks crossing the road? How about people walking on the sidewalk? Wait, don't cross on a red light!

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more
programme.desc: The Bubblegum Bandit pulls another bubblegum burglary and is about to escape when Officer Oona bursts his bubble! Moments later, little Billy skates right into the action and his skateboard becomes a gummy mess! Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Steve's Street Sweeper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Steve the Street Sweeper is cleaning the street when garbage splatters all over the side of his truck! He doesn't want a dirty truck, so Steve races to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Steve's vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Steve leaves one happy customer, and is ready to get back to sweeping rubbish.

programme.title: Down By The Bay - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see cat wearing a hat? How about a goat rowing a boat? Well you can in this video for the classic children’s song, Down By The Bay!

programme.title: Mr. Pig & Mr. Mouse Have A Mess On Their Hands - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig love making food and having their friends over to eat it. But afterwards, their house is a complete mess! It's so gross, they don't even want to drive their van home to clean up. How can Mr. Mouse and Mr. Pig share their love of food with their friends without cluttering their home? Mr. Monkey has a tasty idea! What is it? Watch and find out!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: Finny The Shark - Down In The Bay and more
programme.desc: Did you ever see a shark glowing in the dark? Did you ever see a stingray dancing at the ballet? Finny and Mama Shark are singing a rhyming song about all of their silly friends down in the bay! Sing along!

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a Hungarian Gypsy Fiddle to a girl named Petra in Budapest. Petra takes it to an amazing island, but the animals in the petting zoo are entranced by the music. A princess in England is excited about her five dogs attending a royal ball in fancy costumes that Jett delivers. But when a prince attending the ball is scared of the dogs Jett volunteers to puppy-sit and the dogs escape.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett calls in Paul and his Police Patrol pals to help a little girl named Isabella celebrate her birthday in one of the loneliest, most remote locations in the world. Jett brings a Veterinarian Kit to a boy named Adika at Serengeti National Park in Tanzania. Jett joins Adika on a fieldcall to investigate an elephant stuck in the middle of the road.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a giant Snakes and Ladders game to Anita who is having a pajama party with her friends. To complete a game challenge, Donnie's Build-It Buddies turn Anita's bed into a princess' carriage. A boy named Ray who lives in Palau, South Pacific, wants to see a Manta Ray in the wild. Jett and the Wild Team do their best to help him find one but end up trapped in a Blue Hole.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a friendship bracelet to Catalina for her pen pal Vo the Rover. But when Vo goes missing, Astra and the Galaxy Wings take them to outer space to search for her. While on his way to deliver a package to a boy named Omar, Jett gets stuck in quicksand in the Sahara desert. Worried that Jett is overdue, Omar contacts Sky, and Paul's Police Patrol is sent.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When Jett delivers a toy vacuum cleaner to a boy in Switzerland Donnie modifies it to be "bigger and better". But the new vacuum is too powerful and gets away. When World Airport Delivery Depot manager Neo's drones replace the Super Wings, one delivers an empty package to a girl in South Korea. Jett finds what she ordered in Donnie's hangar... but the drones won't give it up!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a wedding ring to a boy named Christo whose Dad is getting married. Trouble arises when a pelican snatches the ring. Jett delivers a tree tap and bucket to a girl in Quebec. But one tap can't produce enough sap to make the maple candies Manon wants to bring to a maple syrup festival. Donnie's Build-It Buddies bring all the gear needed, but a syrupy spill causes a major roadblock.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a sticker book to a boy named Victor in Mexico whose Mom has a plan: if Victor earns 10 stickers by doing 10 chores, she'll give him a big reward. Jett and the Build-it Buddies come up with an elaborate plan to help rush a crop of small, unripe kiwifruit to market. But the kiwifruit grow too big too fast, and cause a giant kiwifruit avalanche.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a costume to a boy named Nav in Abu Dhabi for an Air Show competition.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy deliver a package of harmless hair dyes and a grooming kit to a girl named Olenca in Cusco, Peru. Olenca wants to dye her pet alpacas with pretty colors. However, the animals don't like the process, panic, and run away. When a girl in Guangzhou, China brings her cat to a famous festival of lights in Huacheng Square, the cat takes off, chasing after at the light show's laser beams.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie head for Montgomery, Alabama in America where they join a boy named Kevin and his Dad on Fathers' Day at a car factory to build a car! But the Super Wings need to save the car and the factory from total destruction. When a girl named Cynthia in Yaounde, Cameroon, asks for a toy train for her baby chimp to ride on, things get dodgy fast. Kimba, the chimp, takes off into the jungle.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie head for Roros, Norway to deliver a dress that shoots pretend snow. It's for a girl named Alice who is starring in the play "The Snow Princess". But a snowstorm threatens to cancel the play! Jett and Paul head to Saint Gallen, Switzerland to deliver a gingerbread man costume. It's for a boy named Teri who wants to use it to cheer on his pet pig, Otto, in a pig race.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Mira fly to San Cristobal, Ecuador to deliver super strong bubble solution. It's for a boy who wants to blow super strong bubbles that will last and last. But the bubbles trap sea animals and float them away! When a girl named Sylviya asks for a special watering can for her flowers, Jett and Dizzy head to Bulgaria. This leads to an encounter with bees and a new Super Wing named Bucky.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A young boy named Gio asks the Super Wings to build him a special suit to wear to the local Mud Festival that will protect him from getting muddy. When the suit goes haywire Jett and the Super Wings come to the rescue. A young boy in Denmark orders egg capsules to hold three baby "block" dinosaurs he invented. But the eggs hatch early and imprint on Jett.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy in the Australian Outback wants to see a U.F.O. and meet an alien. He orders a mini satellite which unexpectedly leads to a rescue mission. Jett and Mira fly to Amphawa, Thailand, and deliver an enormous cake to a boy named Phra. They transport the cake on a raft through a floating market, but its fruit toppings attract the attention of some hungry Thai wildlife.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl who lives in the Netherlands asks for a tiny dress, a 'Dream Dress". When Jett and Bucky arrive, Nina tells them that she hopes it won't get taken, as a lot of things have been disappearing from her doll house lately. A girl on Easter Island asks for giant propeller caps for the Moai statues near her home. But the wind picks up and turns the Moai into head-helicopters.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A Scottish boy named Rooney asks the Super Wings to create a special mega-sized soccer uniform for his friend Jack, who is a tractor. Jack needs the uniform for an upcoming match of Tractor Soccer. A boy in Hawaii orders a special vacuum to clean up the garbage he's found in a bay where he rescued a young sea turtle. Before releasing the turtle, they discover a massive garbage island.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett's friend from Japan, Namiko, orders enormous sheets of origami paper. She and her friends use them for the Paper Rangers fan convention. But an animatronic of Paper Rangers' enemy Drac the Ripper goes haywire. Jett and Donnie deliver special tires to a boy named Gaspard in the Gobi Desert. Enjo gets overconfident with the new tires and accidentally startles some sheep.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: World Aircraft is flying through the Himalayas when an order comes in from a house near Mt Everest. Jett and Dizzy are sent to deliver some mega-sized art supplies to two brothers who want to make a mega-sized "Good Luck" card for their Dad. He's about to climb Mt. Everest! But when World Aircraft gets into trouble and crashes, it's going to take more than a Supercharge to save it!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby's innate curiosity about all they see and hear increases on a daily basis. Before long, they begin to associate words with objects and to imitate and articulate sounds. Why not give their eyes and ears something wonderful to feast upon? Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: The Sandbox
programme.desc: The Sandbox is where our favorite Baby Einstein characters gather to play, problem-solve and have fun. Each five-minute episode explores an area of curiosity relevant to our 2-4 year old audience. Since the four weathered planks of wood that make up the structure of their sandbox are no obstacles for their imaginations, the entire universe is available to them for each new adventure.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

programme.title: Wheels on The Firetruck & More Kids Songs - Junior Squad
programme.desc: Sing & dance along to Wheels on The Firetruck! Enjoy popular songs for toddlers featuring the Junior Squad!

programme.title: Old MacDonald Had a Farm + More Kids Songs - Farmees
programme.desc: Sing along to Old Macdonald Had A Farm! With the Farmees, learn songs like Humpty Dumpty and many more!

programme.title: Rainbow Wheels On The Bus - Little Eddie
programme.desc: Watch the bus goes on an adventure through the town! Also learn other popular & kids friendly songs!

programme.title: Kids TV Cartoon Shows
programme.desc: Loco Nuts revolves around the fun adventures of 6 animal friends – Alex (the bear), John (the elephant), Ruby (the cat), Charlie (the mischievous monkey), Lily (the rabbit) and Toby (the dog). They love to play pranks on one another but also are there to help when one of them is in trouble. A silent comedy, the series is a laugh riot that can be enjoyed by all ages.

programme.title: Five Little Penguins + More Kids Songs from Kids TV
programme.desc: The Five Little Penguins have been jumping in the snow. What's going to happen when one falls down?

programme.title: Three Little Pigs & More Kids Stories - Super Supremes
programme.desc: This fun collection of nursery rhymes features stories starring the superhero family The Super Supremes!

programme.title: Five Little Ducks Nursery Rhymes & Kids Songs - Boom Buddies
programme.desc: Five Little Duck, Bingo The Dog, Incy Wincy Spider and many more Boom Buddies rhymes! Happy singing!

programme.title: Nursery Rhymes for Children + More Kids Song - Jelly Bears
programme.desc: Join Jelly Bears as they dance to preschool rhymes like Five Little Teddy Bears, Johny Johny and more!

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails find an underground world of diamonds, but they are held captive there by a miserly Mole-Troll. When Robotnik comes to capture them, he accidently frees them from the Mole-Troll, who teams up with Sonic and Tails to defend his riches.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Scratch and Grounder use Robotnik's new Slo-Mo Ray Gun to capture Sonic, Tails rescues him by reversing the gun and turning it on a tribe of friendly Tree Sloth People who become a high speed commando strike force against Robotnik.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails and other Mobius citizens are lured into Robotnik's robotic games of chance, and when they lose they're sent to slave labor camps. Sonic rescues Tails and the others by beating the house in games of chance at Robotnik's Casino.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: In Part II, Sonic and Sally steal the Roboti-sizer plans, stop the Destroyer from polluting the Great Forest and save Little Sonic, Little Sally and Dulcy's mother, Sabina.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Antoine decides to study martial arts but after he wrecks most of Knothole Sonic sends him off to practice in the woods. //Tails begins his training to become a real Freedom Fighter by learning tracking skills while on a camping trip.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Dulcy exhibits strange behavior, Sally discovers she's going through a "rites of passage" stage of her adolescence. In Dragon tradition, she is drawn to Dragon Lair, a migratory nesting ground, through trance-like visits from her mother.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Hedgehogs congregate on the Floating Island in their latest effort to find their mother. But Sleet and Dingo also have an interest in this island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: As Sonic begins to chow chili dogs for a snack, he finds a message in the sack from his mother urging him to head to Speedster Island.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonic becomes aggravated that maybe their efforts of fighting for freedom seem pointless. Sonia suggests that they go to the Oracle for advice.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! According to the note that Kiki left behind, a princess falls under a spell from time to time and in order to break it, they need to play the music box nearby Kiki. But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ellie's and Jessy's hair are a complete mess after Felicia accidentally causes some Rainbow fruit to fall on them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a hairdresser. // It's winter in Rainbow Village. Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that last night a huge ice mountain appeared so everyone is enjoying an ice sculpture festival. But Jessy seems to have a toothache.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Jessy accidentally ate Ellie's magic beans and became as huge as a giant. // Thunderbell is very sad because his best friend, Mr. Sloth, is angry at him. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A Flower Festival is underway in Rainbow Village and Ling Ling has called Rainbow Ruby to help her judge the "best flower" contest. But just as Rainbow Ruby starts looking around at the flowers, Kiki's pet dog Pom Pom starts acting unusual and running around frantically, destroying the festival! // Gina and Jessy are with a huge fish that's injured by the lake. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Marine Biologist. Rainbow Ruby uses her encyclopedia to find out that the fish is actually a dolphin.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. Rainbow Ruby designs hats where the birds can comfortably sit without disturbing the villagers. // The village friends were planning to have some fun with the rainbow fish but they're all disappointed to discover that the lake has frozen over.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell.
